REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY GRANTED A LEAVE TO AMEND TO "ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION ASSERTED NOT BASED ON A PRIOR RECORDED RECONVEYANCE/SATISFACTION OF THE DEED OF TRUST." THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, AS CONFIRMED BY ARGUMENTS IN THE OPPOSITION IN THE REPLY IS BASED ON THE RECONVEYED/VOIDED/ERADICATED DEED OF TRUST THEORY. (OPPOSITION 5:13-16). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. The Court has previously granted a leave to amend to "allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action asserted not based on a prior recorded reconveyance/satisfaction of the Deed of Trust." The amended complaint, as confirmed by arguments in the opposition in the reply is based on the reconveyed/voided/eradicated Deed of Trust theory. (Opposition 5:13-16).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
